REDMIST-ONRUSH.description:
#Deal !D! Damage. 
 If the target is killed, repeat this attack on a random enemy
REDMIST-UPSTANDING_SLASH.title: Upstanding Slash
REDMIST-UPSTANDING_SLASH.description: #Deal !D! damage {Repeat} times. If 10 or more Damage is unblocked, reduce the cost of ALL Upstanding Slash cards by 1 this combat and draw 1 card next turn.
REDMIST-SPEAR.title: Spear
REDMIST-SPEAR.description: #Deal !D! damage {Repeat} times. If 10 or more Damage is unblocked, reduce the cost of ALL Spear cards by 1 this combat and draw 1 card next turn.
REDMIST-LEVEL_SLASH.title: Level Slash
REDMIST-LEVEL_SLASH.description: #Deal !D! damage {Repeat} times, Apply {BleedPower} Bleed. If 10 or more Damage is unblocked, reduce the cost of ALL Level Slash cards by 1 this combat and draw 1 card next turn.

REDMIST-GREATER_SPLIT_HORIZONTAL.title: Greater Split: Horizontal
REDMIST-GREATER_SPLIT_HORIZONTAL.descrip: #Deal !D! damage to all enemies. Apply {BleedPower} Bleed
